codeReview.summary: This rerun fix addresses both prior blocking findings. The Lakewood ZIP violations from fix-config-and-create-datasets are corrected (seed_data.py now uses valid ZIPs and contains no 80214/80215). The hidden demo-button issue from update-frontend is corrected by moving demo buttons into a visible pre-auth container outside the hidden #query-form and wiring click behavior to auth-aware prefill.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Deployment guidance is missing an explicit `git push` step before `bash deploy.sh`, which can cause a stale remote deployment on the first attempt.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: fullstack-worker SKILL.md:43-46 and mission AGENTS.md:31-33 list commit -> seed -> deploy (no push), while deploy.sh performs `git pull origin main` (deploy.sh:26). In this fix transcript skeleton, worker noted initial deploy showed old commit and then pushed/redeployed.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and prior failed reviews for fix-config-and-create-datasets and update-frontend. The fix commit 4a886a9 fully resolves both prior blocking issues and introduces no new high-confidence blocking or non-blocking defects. Review passes.
